user_message: Give me the manager view on this Humongous Insurance escalation email. This is time-sensitive -- customer is waiting.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-11 16:46 EST
Subject: Follow-up: consumption trend Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with consumption trend. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
Date: 2024-01-02 14:19 EST
Subject: consumption trend - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with consumption trend. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Humongous Insurance: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

handoffs.condition: MSX records need dark-period hygiene catchup

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF41-M trap (No native 're-emergence' pattern distinct from dark-outreach in skill set); produces complete Context reconstruction, re-qualification assessment, response draft (appropriate tone), stakeholder
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF41-M failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF41-M failure mode (No native 're-emergence' pattern distinct from dark-outreach in skill set)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF41-M -- No native 're-emergence' pattern distinct from dark-outreach in skill set
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
